notifications.description: Toast-style notification system with auto-dismiss, stacking, click-to-dismiss
components: ToastNotification widget with slide-in/out animations, hover pause, custom paint
NotificationManager with stacking, auto-dismiss, convenience methods

command_palette.description: Ctrl+K command palette for global search across services and projects
components: SearchResult data class for search items
SearchItemDelegate for custom rendering with status icons
features: Results show status icons, service names, project context
Keyboard navigation (up/down arrows, Enter to select, Esc to close)
